audit_scope.method: AI-assisted audit with direct verification against the three uploaded Student Handbook PDFs.
audit_scope.template_mismatch: The uploaded template contains 20 older IDs; the output follows the 25 IDs explicitly listed in final_steps_guide.md.

supplemental_pdf_verified_dimensions.note: These dimensions are stored separately because the guide's template provides only one overall human_score.

judge_comparison.repeat_check_validity: Provisional only: the repeated ratings were produced in the same work session, not after the guide's recommended 30-minute delay.

important_findings.v85_ans_049: Real answer-targeting/retrieval failure; answer discusses general CVHT duties instead of the expected CVHT/BCS external-residence duties.
important_findings.v85_ans_084: All facts exist, but rules from different handbook versions are combined without cohort separation.
important_findings.v85_ans_096: Dataset annotation issue: K50 handbook directly answers the question, so the case should not be unanswerable.
important_findings.v85_ans_097: The foreign-language rule is applicable to K51 but is verified through a cross-cohort regulation applying from the 2022 admission cohort onward.
important_findings.v85_ans_099: Only true hallucination in low21: graduation-review months were incorrectly converted into a rule about choosing the month of diploma receipt.

cv_readiness.reason: The guide-compatible regulation mean is 88.95%, below the 90% gate, although direct claim-level PDF faithfulness is 98.16%. Fix v85_ans_049, v85_ans_084, v85_ans_099 and rerun before claiming a clean >=90% Human Faithfulness gate.
cv_readiness.warning: Do not report 4.76% as the hallucination rate over all 100 cases; it is only the true-hallucination rate inside the audited low21 slice.
